markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Investigate a PostHog signup data discrepancy and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**PostHog data is unreliable.** A sharp signup drop is a false signal from ad blockers and fraud filters; internal data shows week-over-week growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**The complex install-first flow is a deliberate anti-fraud measure.** It prioritizes user quality over speed, but a redesign is in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Content focus is shifting to support new products.** The team will deliver a content plan for the "Code Reviews" feature (launching in \~2 weeks) and the "Context Engine" (soft launch next week).](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

## Topics

### Signup Data Discrepancy

  - [**Problem:** PostHog shows a sharp signup drop over the last two weeks, despite stable traffic to the install page.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Cause:** The data is unreliable due to:](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [**Ad Blockers:** Block PostHog events, a common tool for the developer audience.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [**Fraud Filters:** Aggressively remove fraudulent signups, which PostHog may still track.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Validation:** Internal data (dbt project) confirms week-over-week signup growth, proving the PostHog signal is false.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Action:** Augment Code will prioritize fixing PostHog's accuracy, as other teams now rely on it for reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### User Onboarding Flow

  - [**Current Flow:** A multi-step, install-first process designed to filter out low-quality users.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
    1.  [CTA → Install page](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
    2.  [Code editor button → Deep link triggers editor](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
    3.  [Extension install](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
    4.  [Extension login button → Website login form](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
    5.  [Account creation → Triggers "signup" event](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This high-friction flow is a direct response to past fraud issues.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Future:** A redesign of the install page and related assets is in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### Content Strategy & Product Roadmap

  - [**Current Focus:** Rewriting underperforming articles to improve install conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [**New Priority:** Create a content plan for the upcoming "Code Reviews" feature.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [**Launch:** In \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [**Request:** A list of existing and planned SEO-focused blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Product Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [**Context Engine (MCCP):**](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
          - [**Soft Launch:** Next week (friends & family).](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
          - [**Public Launch:** January.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [**Code Reviews:**](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
          - [**Launch:** In \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Share a "before & after" example of a successful content rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [**Jason:** Deliver the content plan for the "Code Reviews" feature.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Edin:** Tag Sylvain on PRs for new content to keep him informed.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**Augment Code:** Prioritize fixing PostHog data accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/ycen5mk89Ni3TgWSrMvwWEDin87yHwtC?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
